name: cloudcart-mern-checkpoint
description: CloudCart MERN e-commerce app with local concurrent dev and Vercel deployment support.

scripts.build: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.check: node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/config/db.js && node --check backend/config/appState.js && node --check backend/data/products.js && node --check backend/seeders/productSeeder.js && node --check backend/seeder.js && node --check backend/controllers/healthController.js && node --check backend/controllers/productController.js && node --check backend/controllers/orderController.js && node --check backend/routes/index.js && node --check backend/routes/products.routes.js && node --check backend/routes/orders.routes.js && node --check backend/middleware/asyncHandler.js && node --check backend/middleware/errorMiddleware.js && node --check backend/middleware/orderMiddleware.js && node --check backend/models/Product.js && node --check backend/models/Order.js
